package rulecoverage

func PositiveTableNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepository() string {
    ruleID := "table_name_literals_duplicated_outside_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated table-name strings across handlers, services, and jobs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
